text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Ikuno Dictus and<n>Bamboo
Memory chatting in the plaza.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hm... You're saying someone's<n>made a mess of
the flowerbed?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, exactly! So you gotta help me<n>catch the
culprit! I'm no good when it<n>comes to using my
noggin!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Very well. In that case, we must first<n>determine
whether anyone has seen<n>the perpetrator.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Okay, so the first person who<n>found the
mess was...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa. Whoa! MasterDetective Ikuno?! Hey, push up yourglasses and say...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Consider the case... cracked. Or<n>something like
that! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
All right. I'll do that once I've actually<n>determined
the culprit, so please share<n>any information you
can first.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, so you're really #OnTheCase?<n>Just a sec!
Lemme think of something<n>cool to say!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
No embellishments, please. Just tell<n>us what you
saw.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, gotcha. ♪ Now, what did I see<n>again...
Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I think maybe I saw Gold Spice.<n>Wait,
omigosh! ☆ Did I legit just catch<n>the perp?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Gold Spice... You mean Golshi?Again?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Again?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, we had to book her once<n>already. Guess
there's just no<n>helping some people.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a moment. I believe it's too<n>soon to act
on conjecture alone. We<n>need proper evidence.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But all the culprit's left behind is a<n>bunch of
footprints.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Footprints?! Evidence like that is sure<n>to help us
identify the culprit. Please,<n>show me.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Judging by the depth and size of<n>these footprints,
the culprit doesn't<n>have an especially large build.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Most importantly, these tracks were<n>left by
cleats.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The longer cleats are worn, the more<n>they reflect
their owner.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whoooaa! ☆ You sound like a legit<n>detective!
Really getting into character,<n>huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: → Uhhh, what? What's going on<n>exactly?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
We can use the cleat tracks to obtain<n>information
about the culprit.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The fronts of the cleats appear to be<n>very worn
down, so perhaps we're<n>looking for an individual
with an<n>unusually intense drive to push<n>ahead.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So, I'm guessing it's not Golshi, then,<n>right? That
doesn't really sound like<n>her.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Helios. Are you sure you didn't see<n>anyone
besides Golshi? Please think<n>carefully.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. First, I found the tracks. Then<n>I called for
Bamboo, 'cause she was<n>close by...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Consider the case... cracked.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ngh! Ikuno?! What're you doing?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Are you kidding me?! I was theone who went and walked through theflowerbed?! Oh geez. I'm real sorry!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It's all right. It's not as if you did it on<n>purpose.
And the flowers are<n>undamaged, thankfully.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Besides, undoing such minimal<n>damage will be
quite easy. I'll help<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Bet! We'll be done in like, two<n>seconds! ♪

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You guys... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Ikuno Dictus's efforts bring the case<n>to a close.
